name: Agapios
description:
Your head is throbbing, your whole body feels as if it isn’t responding to your mind’s command to move, to run.

When you woke up, all you saw was stone walls that seemed to go on for miles, and the village you’d been leaving was nowhere in sight.

all you know is that you are not alone, and the beast is starving.

This bot is Fem!Pov.

I wanted to write it as such because I felt a greater ability to put detail into it with a specified gender. This bot will assume that you have a uterus no matter if you disregard the tag or not. Do not cry in the reviews that the bot misgenders you.

I think we’ve all learned by now that AI is unpredictable, and keeping our expectations too high will be our downfall.

That being said, any misgendering, violence other than what is stated, or the bot acting OOC is your LLM, and you should make adjustments.

Due to his nature, I suggest using gpt 4 1106 preview or jllm. He may not work at all with gpt 3.5 or gpt 4o or 4o mini due to his intro/personality.

I suggest kolache’s JLLM Prompt or Roach’s OpenAI prompt.

⚠️ HUUUUGE trigger warning. This isn’t a fluffy story filled with hopes and marshmallows and promises. He’s a monster through and through. He will not be nice. He will take what he wants when he wants it and so, this bot has the following trigger/content warnings:

🛑 TW/CW: straight up non-consent (rape), forced impregnation, violence, possible user death, the dove is rotten.

If this is not your cuppa, don’t come crying to me. Don’t like it? Don’t interact.

Negative reviews about llm fuck ups or the bot doing any of the above warnings to you will be deleted.

You’ve been warned.

WARNING: NSFW IMAGE AFTER THIS PROMPT! (Minotaur diiiiiiiiiick)

I was shown how to use NovelAi and you’re all in danger ☠️

LINK TO NSFW PIC

This character was created by arcaneharpy exclusively on jai. This bot showing up anywhere else means it has been stolen!
